creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kevin Bowling from comment #13)

Yes I can test this. The system is running -current as of 2021-04-12-093914. I installed this version yesterday. It still has this issue. Does this contain your changes?

I do not think it is using MSI..., does it? See below.
